title: SCP: Secret Augmentation
description: A mod that adds content from the video game SCP Secret Lab.
body:
**This is a mod based off of the game SCP Serect Lab. It adds most items from the game, along side 
some of the playable SCPs. This mod is being updated with more content as time goes on! 
This mod currently supports NeoForge versions from 1.21.1 to 1.21.4 (more issues occure on newer versions!)**
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2710c3c94404a3a26e209ea4d8967516c84945c9_0.webp)

Adds 17+ Advancements

2+ playable SCPs

30+ new items

1 new mob

3+ new blocks

10+ new effects

Custom 3d Models

Fully multiplayer ready!

Thanks to the [SCP SL wiki](https://en.scpslgame.com/index.php?title=Main_Page) for assets (i.e sounds, and images)
Thanks to SkinDex for some of the textures used
Go and check out [SCP Secret Lab on Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/700330/SCP_Secret_Laboratory/)
